name: neon-nexus-bullet-time-brickbreaker
description: Neon Nexus: Bullet-Time Brick Breaker — a visually-stunning, cross-platform neon brick breaker built on Phaser 4.
author: Tuhin Karmakar

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/stamp-version.mjs && node scripts/gen-icons.mjs && node scripts/gen-app-ads.mjs
scripts.ship:android: node scripts/validate-ship-env.mjs --android && pnpm run build && node scripts/sync-capacitor-admob.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-admob-manifest.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-sdk.mjs && node scripts/sync-android-version.mjs && node scripts/copy-android-keystore-example.mjs && cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:all: pnpm run build && node scripts/sync-capacitor-admob.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-admob-manifest.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-sdk.mjs && node scripts/sync-android-version.mjs && cap sync
scripts.cap:android: pnpm run build && node scripts/sync-capacitor-admob.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-admob-manifest.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-sdk.mjs && node scripts/sync-android-version.mjs && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: pnpm run build && node scripts/sync-capacitor-admob.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-admob-plist.mjs && cap sync ios && cap open ios
scripts.cap:add:android: pnpm run build && cap add android && node scripts/patch-android-admob-manifest.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-sdk.mjs && node scripts/sync-android-version.mjs && node scripts/copy-android-keystore-example.mjs && cap sync android
scripts.cap:add:ios: pnpm run build && cap add ios && node scripts/patch-ios-admob-plist.mjs && cap sync ios
